# Eli's Hot Sand Surf School

> Surf school offering private and small-group lessons in Playa Grande and Playa
> Tamarindo, Guanacaste, Costa Rica. All levels and ages welcome; beginner-friendly.

## About
Eli is a local surf instructor. Lessons are 90 minutes and include a soft-top board
and rashguard. Playa Grande is his home break. Bilingual instruction (English/Spanish).

## Lessons & pricing
- Private lesson: $120 (one-on-one, 90 min)
- Group lesson: $60 per person (2+ people, 90 min)
- Multi-day package: price on request (includes fresh local fruit & coconuts,
  shade tent, and beach chairs)

## Booking & contact
- WhatsApp: +506 8800 7880 (fastest)
- Email: Eabdalah.surf@gmail.com
- Online booking calendar on the website
- Location: Playa Grande & Playa Tamarindo, Guanacaste, Costa Rica
